items.title: Iran says staff blocked from entering US after players given World Cup visas

items.title: Scotland thrash Bolivia ahead of World Cup opener
items.summary: Che Adams scored twice as a dominant Scotland thrashed Bolivia 4-0 in New Jersey in their final friendly before getting their World Cup campaign under way next week.

items.title: Woad given two-shot penalty for bunker infringement at US Women's Open
items.summary: Lottie Woad was handed a two-stroke penalty during the third round of the US Women's Open on Saturday following a rule breach in a bunker.
